mapper.select:
SELECT noticeId, title, writerEmpId, writerName, hitCount, regDate, updateDate FROM approvalNotice
(UPPER(title) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(writerName) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%')
ORDER BY noticeId DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvalNotice
(UPPER(title) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(writerName) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%')
SELECT noticeId, title, content, writerEmpId, writerName, hitCount, regDate, updateDate FROM approvalNotice WHERE noticeId = #{noticeId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT approvalNotice_seq.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO approvalNotice (noticeId, title, content, writerEmpId, writerName) VALUES (#{noticeId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writerEmpId}, #{writerName})
mapper.update: UPDATE approvalNotice SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updateDate = SYSDATE WHERE noticeId = #{noticeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approvalNoticeFile (fileId, noticeId, oriFilename, saveFilename, fileSize, regDate) VALUES (approvalNoticeFile_seq.NEXTVAL, #{noticeId}, #{oriFilename}, #{saveFilename}, #{fileSize}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT fileId, noticeId, oriFilename, saveFilename, fileSize, TO_CHAR(regDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate FROM approvalNoticeFile WHERE noticeId = #{noticeId} ORDER BY fileId
SELECT fileId, noticeId, oriFilename, saveFilename, fileSize, TO_CHAR(regDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate FROM approvalNoticeFile WHERE fileId = #{fileId}
